description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design, featuring a mix of dark and natural brick exterior finishes. The house is set on a paved lot with a wooden deck that wraps around a rectangular swimming pool, complemented by outdoor lounge furniture and large palm trees for landscaping. The front facade has large floor-to-ceiling windows, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. A driveway leads to a parked car on the side, and the property is bordered by a mix of palm and deciduous trees. The rear and side elevations are more private, with smaller windows and a solid brick finish. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and open outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a wooden deck with a pool, surrounded by palm and deciduous trees. The exterior combines dark and natural brick finishes for a sleek, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, wooden deck, pool, and landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid brick wall, driveway with a parked car, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private side of the house, smaller windows, and the continuation of the wooden deck and pool area.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the pool, outdoor lounge area, and the expansive glass facade opening to the deck.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows on the front facade
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door with no steps, integrated into the facade with minimal overhang and no porch, emphasizing clean lines and openness.
